title: habenaria brachyceras
intro: Habenaria brachyceras, also known as the short-spurred orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Habenaria brachyceras include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Habenaria brachyceras is often prepared as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
